title: Horror Reborn
description: The most realistic fabric horror modpack.
body:
![Horror Reborn Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ab67af5405fbd23af114ffc2b5fa8ea9766ad46.png)

> _This modpack is still in early development, meaning bugs and crashes may occur._

# COMPLETE REVAMP IN PROGRESS, STAY TUNED
## Welcome to Horror Reborn!
Most - if not all - horror modpacks seem to be based on forge. I decided to fill in for all the people who prefer fabric. This modpack is made with realism, difficulty, multiplayer support and most obviously horror in mind.

You're always being watched, and knowing this, you'll feel an intense presence upon you. This modpack is the most realistic, horrific experience.
‎ 
## Recommended settings
- This modpack is meant to be played with all resourcepacks included.
- It is recommended to use anywhere between **12 to 18 chunk render distance**.
- Multiplayer is supported and is much more fun.
- **Shaders are NOT recommended, V3.0 made the modpack playable without shaders**.

## Bug Reports

If any bugs or crashes found, please **add squafy on Discord** and report them directly. Or alternativly, join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/hRG3hkzspp).

<details>
<summary>How to play?</summary>

## How to play?
A guide will be introduced in V0.3 to help new players. For now, below you'll find the mod links that change the start of the game the most, please read through atleast "No Tree Punching" to make sense of what is going on.

- [No Tree Punching](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-tree-punching)
- [Unnecessary Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/unnecessary-overhaul)
  
**Download V0.1 if you want a more simple experience**
</details>
